description: Style NoteWho do you go to for great Friday Dressing options? allen solly of course! Just because you have to look professional at work, doesn't mean you can't have fun with your clothes. These trousers will give you a good dose of style to make sure you're looking your best at work or play.Product DetailsBlack trousers with flat front, pockets on the sides, two pockets at the back with button closures, brand badge above the left back pocket, looped waist, and a zipper and button closure on the frontMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warm in a gentle cycle, using a mild detergentUse only non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowWarm ironSize and FitAllen Solly union fit low waistThe model (height 6' and waist 32& rdquo ) is wearing a size 30
